evals.prompt: I have a demo coming up with Starbucks, they're CPG. Main goal is improving loyalty and reducing coupon waste.
evals.expected_output: Database glawrence_demo_starbucks, Parent Segment Demo - Starbucks, CPG blueprint with all tables, correct YAML schema

evals.prompt: Set up a demo for Kaiser Permanente -- they're interested in patient engagement and reducing no-shows
evals.expected_output: Database glawrence_demo_kaiser_permanente, Parent Segment Demo - Kaiser Permanente, Healthcare blueprint
